translation.builder_subtitle: Drag and drop blocks to create your custom interval routine.
translation.r2e_desc: Exchange your running mileage points to unlock premium native HUD skins.
translation.history_subtitle: Your past runs and route maps.
translation.unlock_msg:
Do you want to unlock this theme?
Cost: {{price}} M
Balance: {{balance}} M
translation.weekly_goal_desc: Set your target distance (km) for this week (Mon-Sun).
translation.speech_pace_slow: You are slower than target pace. Increase your speed.
translation.speech_pace_fast: You are faster than target pace. Conserve your energy.
translation.speech_pace_perfect: Excellent! You are maintaining the target pace perfectly.
translation.speech_km_passed: Passed {{km}} kilometers. Average pace is {{m}} minutes and {{s}} seconds. {{feedback}}
translation.speech_time_passed: {{min}} minutes elapsed. Total distance: {{km}} kilometers. Keep up the good work!
translation.indoor_mode_desc: Choose how you want to track your run.
translation.indoor_mode_active_desc: Measure distance based on your steps.
translation.indoor_mode_passive_desc: Track time only. Input distance manually.
translation.delete_confirm_msg: Are you sure you want to delete this run record?
translation.builder_start_routine: Welcome! Today's program is {{name}}. I am your pace runner, let's complete this together!
translation.builder_next_segment: Segment finished. Great effort! Next up is {{type}} for {{value}}{{unit}}. {{hint}}
translation.builder_routine_finished: Awesome! You have successfully completed all segments of today's program. Now, finish your remaining distance at a comfortable, free pace. Great job!
translation.speech_start_summary: Starting your run with target distance {{km}}km and target pace {{m}}m {{s}}s. I'll be right here guiding you until the end. Let's go!
translation.hint_warmup: Start with a light jog to warm up your muscles and prevent injury.
translation.hint_steady: Keep a steady breath and maintain this pace consistently.
translation.hint_interval: Pace up now! Focus and push yourself until you're slightly out of breath.
translation.hint_recovery: Slow down and recover your breath. This is the stage to recharge for the next segment.
translation.hint_cooldown: Almost done! Let's cool down with a very light pace to wrap up today's session.
translation.builder_segment_alert: In a few moments, the {{type}} segment will begin. It will last for {{value}} {{unit}}. {{hint}}
translation.builder_routine_ending: The formal training program is about to end. Amazing work today!
